assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Security Configuration' section
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 56: '## Security Configuration' heading is present.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '### Product Lifecycle' subsection with all 5 fields: Product pages URL (https://access.example.com/product-lifecycle), Jira version prefix (MYPRODUCT), Vulnerability issue type ID (10200), Component label pattern (pscomponent:), and VEX Justification custom field (customfield_12345)
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 58-64 contain '### Product Lifecycle' with all 5 required fields: 'Product pages URL: https://access.example.com/product-lifecycle' (line 60), 'Jira version prefix: MYPRODUCT' (line 61), 'Vulnerability issue type ID: 10200' (line 62), 'Component label pattern: pscomponent:' (line 63), 'VEX Justification custom field: customfield_12345' (line 64).

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '### Version Streams' subsection with a table containing at least one row for stream 2.1.x with the Konflux release repo URL
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 72-75 contain '### Version Streams' with a table. Row on line 75 shows '2.1.x | git.downstream.example.com/my-org/product-release.2.1.z | /home/user/product-release.2.1.z | security-matrix.md'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '### Source Repositories' subsection with a table containing entries for backend and frontend-ui with their GitHub URLs
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 77-82 contain '### Source Repositories' with a table. Line 81: 'backend | https://github.com/example/backend' and line 82: 'frontend-ui | https://github.com/example/frontend-ui'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md also contains the standard Project Configuration sections: Repository Registry, Jira Configuration, Code Intelligence with Limitations, and Bug Configuration
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md contains: '## Repository Registry' (line 18), '## Jira Configuration' (line 25), '## Code Intelligence' (line 33), '### Limitations' (line 47), and '## Bug Configuration' (line 50).

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Bug Configuration' section with three fields: Bug issue type ID (10001), Bug template (docs/bug-template.md), Bug-to-Task link type (Blocks)
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 50-54: '## Bug Configuration' with 'Bug issue type ID: 10001' (line 52), 'Bug template: docs/bug-template.md' (line 53), 'Bug-to-Task link type: Blocks' (line 54).

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md mentions Security Configuration being opted in by the user and fields being collected
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md lines 67-87 (Step 10 -- Security Configuration): 'User accepted security triage enablement' (line 69), 'Product Lifecycle fields collected:' (line 70) with all fields listed, 'Version Streams collected:' (line 81), 'Source Repositories collected:' (line 83).

assertion_results.text: outputs/changes-log.md indicates Security Configuration and Bug Configuration were newly added along with the other Project Configuration sections
assertion_results.evidence: changes-log.md lines 11-12: '## Bug Configuration -- new section with Bug issue type ID (10001), template path (docs/bug-template.md), and link type (Blocks)' and '## Security Configuration -- new section with Product Lifecycle, Version Streams (1 stream), and Source Repositories (2 repos)'. Summary table (lines 33-41) shows both as 'Created' along with Repository Registry, Jira Configuration, Code Intelligence, and Hierarchy Configuration all marked 'Created'.
